Tab: Query Evaluator
Purpose: Evaluate OIM SQL queries across 7 dimensions
API: Calls OpenAI / Claude / Grok via configurable provider
Inputs: SQL text, intent description
Output: JSON scorecard with dimension scores and verdict

Key scoring dimensions:
- Safety: no destructive statements, parameterisation
- SARGability: index-friendly predicates
- OIM Correctness: correct table/column names for OIM 9.x
- Optimization: efficient joins, no unnecessary nesting
- Structural Opt: select only needed columns
- Academic Risk: no anti-patterns from training material
- Code Quality: formatting, aliases, readability
